Job Description

We are seeking a skilled DevOps Engineer to manage and optimize database operations, CI/CD pipelines, containerization, cloud deployments, and infrastructure automation. The ideal candidate should have expertise in database administration, DevOps practices, Kubernetes deployments, and automation scripting. This role involves collaboration across development, operations, and database teams to ensure reliable application deployment, infrastructure stability, and database availability.

Key Responsibilities

Database Administration (DBA Activities) - Perform database backup and restore operations for production, staging, and development environments. - Manage database replication, synchronization, and failover configurations. - Monitor performance and perform tuning/optimization. - Handle migrations, patching, and upgrades. - Troubleshoot connectivity, performance, and replication issues. - Ensure high availability, disaster recovery, and data integrity. - Work with databases: PostgreSQL / MySQL / SQL Server / Oracle.

DevOps & CI/CD - Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Azure DevOps. - Automate build, test, and deployment workflows. - Integrate Git branching strategies and pipelines. - Troubleshoot pipeline failures and optimize build performance. - Manage Git repositories.

Kubernetes & Deployment Automation - Deploy applications in Kubernetes clusters using Helm Charts. - Use Argo CD for GitOps-based deployments. - Manage Kubernetes resources: Deployments, StatefulSets, Services, ConfigMaps, Secrets, Jobs/CronJobs, Ingress. - Monitor cluster health and troubleshoot deployment issues.

Containerization - Write and optimize Dockerfiles for deployments. - Build and manage Docker images. - Handle image tagging, versioning, and registry management. - Troubleshoot container runtime issues.

Monitoring & Observability - Set up monitoring with Grafana and Prometheus. - Create dashboards for infrastructure, application, and database monitoring. - Configure alerts and troubleshoot performance bottlenecks. - Monitor API, database, and infrastructure health.

Scripting & Automation - Develop scripts using Python, PowerShell, Bash/Shell. - Automate operational and deployment tasks. - Create scripts for database maintenance, health checks, and deployments.

Agile / Process Management - Work in Agile/Scrum methodology. - Use Azure DevOps/Jira for sprint planning and task tracking. - Collaborate with development, QA, infrastructure, and support teams.

Required Skills

  • Database Administration (Backup, Restore, Replication, HA, Performance Tuning)
  • Jenkins Pipeline creation and troubleshooting
  • Git version control and branching strategies
  • Docker & Kubernetes
  • Argo CD / GitOps deployment
  • Azure DevOps Pipelines
  • Grafana & Prometheus
  • Linux Administration
  • Scripting (Python / PowerShell / Bash)
  • CI/CD best practices
  • Troubleshooting production issues
  • Cloud infrastructure basics
  • Monitoring & alerting tools

Preferred Skills

  • 3-5 Years experience
  • Terraform / Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
  • Disaster recovery and high availability design
  • Microservices architecture
  • Networking concepts (DNS, Load Balancers, Reverse Proxy)
  • Security best practices (Secrets management, RBAC)
  • Log monitoring tools (ELK / Loki)
  • GitOps workflows

Soft Skills

  • Strong problem-solving ability
  • Ownership mindset
  • Cross-functional collaboration
  • Good communication skills
  • Ability to handle production-critical issues
  • Documentation and process improvement mindset
summary: DevOps Engineer role requiring 3-5 years of experience in database administration, CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes, and automation scripting. Focus on infrastructure automation, cloud deployments, and cross-team collaboration.
